arts.ttl: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia: Napoli star completes PSG transfer
arts.sum: Sources told ESPN that the Italian club had wanted to extend his contract but the player refused. The highly-coveted winger, who had been linked with Liverpool, Manchester United and Barcelona in recent transfer windows, had a contract with Napoli through June 2027.

arts.ttl: Official | PSG sign Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia
arts.sum: PSG have signed Khvicha Kvaratskhelia (23) from Napoli, both clubs have announced. The 23-year-old Georgia international winger has signed a four-and-a-half-year deal with the Ligue 1 champions. Kvaratskhelia is now…

arts.ttl: Italy U21 talent could free Kolo Muani to Juventus from PSG
arts.sum: An Italy Under-21 international could be the key to unblocking Randal Kolo Muani to Juventus,...

Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has officially become a player for Paris Saint-Germain, marking a significant move from Napoli to the French club. The talented Georgian forward has left Napoli after an impressive stint, where he made 107 appearances, scoring 30 goals and providing 29 assists. The post OFFICIAL: PSG Sign appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Why Paris Saint-Germain signed Khvicha Kvaratskhelia
arts.sum: Not in terms of profiles -- they are very different players -- or in terms of stats, because Kvaratskhelia will never score 40 goals a season like Kylian used to, but in terms of balancing the team's attack and offering a consistent threat from either flank. Regardless of where he plays, he will offer more balance to the PSG attack that had been far too reliant on the Achraf Hakimi -Dembélé duo on the right so far this season.

arts.ttl: Official: Kvaratskhelia transfer from Napoli to PSG is complete
arts.sum: Napoli have officially completed the sale of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia to Paris Saint-Germain for a reported...

arts.ttl: Tottenham Boosted as Aston Villa Eye Chelsea Outcast as Alternative to €35M-Rated PSG Ace
arts.sum: Milan Škriniar’s future at Paris Saint-Germain appears uncertain, with manager Luis Enrique opting for Willian Pacho and Marquinhos as his preferred center-back duo. This shift has reignited speculation about Škriniar’s potential departure. arts.ttl: Chelsea Express Interest in £70M-Rated Man Utd Standout Amid PSG, Tottenham Links
arts.sum: Rúben Amorim’s decision to leave Alejandro Garnacho out of last month’s Manchester derby has fueled speculation about the winger’s future at Manchester United.
